name: world_bank_indicator
description: Query a World Bank indicator for one country or all countries.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or alpha-3 country code, or 'all' for every country (for example, 'TW', 'USA', 'CN', 'JP').

indicator.description: Indicator code such as 'NY.GDP.MKTP.CD' for GDP in USD, 'SP.POP.TOTL' for total population, 'FP.CPI.TOTL.ZG' for inflation, 'SL.UEM.TOTL.ZS' for unemployment, or 'NY.GDP.PCAP.CD' for GDP per capita.

date.description: Year or year range (for example, '2023' or '2010:2023').

mrv.description: Number of most-recent values to return (for example, 5 returns the latest 5 years).
